---
title: "Setup Guide"
---

## Required tools

Install these before Day 0:

- R
- RStudio
- Git
- Quarto

## Recommended R packages

Do not install everything at once if your computer is slow. We will install packages gradually.

```r
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "Matrix", "patchwork", "here", "renv"))
install.packages("Seurat")
```

Later, we will use Bioconductor packages:

```r
install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install(c("SingleCellExperiment", "scater", "scran", "SingleR", "celldex"))
```

## Folder organization

Create one local folder for the course, for example:

```text
scRNAseq-course/
├── notes/
├── scripts/
├── data/
└── outputs/
```
